title: Birthday Girl Rosette Badge Baby Pink Birthday Girl Award Ribbon Badge Decorations for Kids Girls Party Decoration Supplies
features: ❤【PACKAGE INCLUDES】1 Piece of pink birthday girl ribbon badge.

❤【PERFECT FOR BIRTHDAY】Birthday girl rosette badge is as chic and cute as an addition to a girl's party dress, which provides a nice way to make girls feel distinct at her birthday party or at any moment during her big day.

❤【Design】 Birthday badge with the letters "birthday girl" will get people's attention and guests will know you're the birthday person, make you look different and stand out.The badge is printed with a colourful and childlike design, which is more in keeping with the party atmosphere and more popular with children.

❤【COMFORTABLE TO USE】Birthday girl rosette badge is made of satin fabric and plastic, they are robust, reusable and non-toxic, long lasting,lightweight and comfortable to wear.The snaps on the back are solid, safe and durable and will not harm the body or clothing.
